brief: Domain spotlight (playstyle / strategy) for the Kronos realm in VOIDBORN. Explain how Kronos decks win: unit roles (tanks, siege units, stone golems, rootbound druids, mountain fortresses), curve tips, synergies, and when to pick this realm for ranked. Visual identity: ancient stone, granite, moss, earth magic, golden amber accents, titanic golems and druids. Practical TCG advice without inventing fake card names — speak in archetypes (tanks, burn, flying, etc.). Instagram hooks players who main Kronos; Facebook longer strategy discussion; Discord bullet tips + [Play VOIDBORN](https://voidborn.fun).

image.prompt: An epic cinematic square shot of a towering ancient stone golem covered in moss and golden amber glowing cracks, standing in a mountain pass with ancient architecture, dramatic lighting, volumetric fog, high fantasy art style, 8k resolution.
